summary: The diff only updates project_state.json to record the request as pending; it does not implement any frontend asset or markup changes to swap the header logo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the app’s primary/header logo to use unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png instead of WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg, ensuring the header logo matches the new logo across the site.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend components, assets, or markup were changed—only a project tracking file was modified. There is no evidence the header logo src/path was updated, old logo references removed, or sizing/contain behavior verified.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/updated internal tracking entries (AR-1, AR-2) marking the logo replacement request as a new_feature_request with status pending.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest asks for a frontend-only static asset/markup update; it does not request changes to project tracking/state files.
